hero.bio: I build web apps, end to end. 3 years at French startups, then freelance. I like getting involved from day one — or picking up an existing project and helping it grow.

about.bio1: Fullstack developer, Master 2 from Epitech. 3 years at French startups where I learned to build real products, end to end. Now freelancing, I bring the same rigor to every project — tailored approach, real attention to detail.
about.routine: Up early, gym, then code until something ships. Or breaks. Both happen.
about.quote: A clear problem, a working solution. Fast.
about.quizTeaser: There's a quiz at the bottom of this page, and clues hidden throughout to help you answer. Emilien, the GOAT of question champions, scored 5/5. Think you can do the same?

descriptions.eteos: I was involved in every phase, from conception to deployment. On the technical side, I integrated NFC for authentication and traceability, structured the frontend with reusable components, and laid solid foundations to keep the codebase maintainable over time.
descriptions.upfund: On this real estate SaaS, I touched everything. Data analytics with interactive D3.js visualizations, a map interface to compare properties, scrapers to keep market data up to date, and a back office so the team could manage their own data.
descriptions.petiteMarelle: On this toy rental platform, I worked on the user experience, the customer journey, and order management. I also built an admin interface to track key metrics, and worked on SEO and performance to improve conversion.

skills.heading: What I Work With
skills.bonus: 🤖 Bonus skill: Claude as co-pilot. I brief, Claude builds, I fix. Sometimes in that order. He takes the blame when it crashes. He gets over it fast.

descriptions.wingstop: Production landing page for Wingstop France. Fast, clean, conversion-focused.
descriptions.stanDelivery: Full-stack website for a delivery agency — modern design, brand identity, and SEO built from scratch. End-to-end, from Figma to production.
descriptions.riskManagement: Multi-user crypto portfolio management. Secure Binance API integration, real-time analytics, and automated risk strategies — because watching a chart manually is for amateurs.

football.name: Football
football.detail: Centre-back, I tackle hard. Sometimes the ball.

travel.name: Travel
travel.detail: Japan's been on my list for too long. I'll get there.

videoGames.name: Video Games
videoGames.detail: Call of Duty at night, even if my stats tell a different story.

quiz.heading: Can you beat Emilien?
quiz.reference: 🏆 Emilien · Les 12 Coups de Midi · Score: 5/5 — literally unbeatable

q1.label: Question 1 / 5 · ⚽ Personal
q1.question: What position does Alix play in football?
feedback: Defender. I tackle hard — usually get the ball. Sometimes the man. Ramos would be proud.

q2.label: Question 2 / 5 · 🎮 Personal
q2.question: What's Alix's go-to video game genre?
feedback: FPS. Headshots in-game, hotfixes in prod. Same reflexes.

q3.label: Question 3 / 5 · ✈️ Personal
q3.question: If Alix could travel anywhere right now, where would it be?
feedback: Japan. Big Dragon Ball fan, big Japanese culture fan. The dream destination. 🐉

q4.label: Question 4 / 5 · 🐍 Technical
q4.question: What's Alix's favorite programming language?
feedback: Pascal? Are you trolling? That's a museum exhibit, not a language. 💀
Obviously. Clean, powerful, and snakes are cool. 🐍

q5.label: Question 5 / 5 · ☕ Personal
q5.question: How many coffees does Alix drink per day?
feedback: Wrong. But there's something hidden on this page about coffee... look closer. 👀
Wrong. But there's something hidden on this page about coffee... look closer. 👀
Wrong. But there's something hidden on this page about coffee... look closer. 👀
Zero?! How did you even figure that out?? 🧃

5.title: You're as good as Emilien...
5.msg: ...but not better. The legend stays undefeated.

4.title: Great score!
4.msg: I'm genuinely impressed. Didn't see that coming.

3.title: Not bad...
3.msg: But could do better. Emilien would have nailed all five.

2.title: That's pretty bad.
2.msg: Two out of five. Did you guess, or is it actually worse?

1.title: That's really bad.
1.msg: One point out of 5. Was that on purpose? Emilien is devastated.

0.title: That's embarrassing.
0.msg: I've never seen anything like this. Never. Neither has Emilien.

contact.sub: Open to opportunities, whether freelance, full-time, or something I haven't imagined yet. Let's talk.
